# STRAT.065 ? Essentialism (McKeown)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** self_development
**Domain:** SELF_DEVELOPMENT
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Less but better; disciplined pursuit of less; trade-offs; 90% rule; essential intent; effortless; protect the asset

## Application
Explore widely; eliminate ruthlessly; execute effortlessly; say no to non-essential; 90% test; clear essential intent; protect yourself

## Key Values
- Less but better
- Disciplined no
- Essential only
- Effortless execution
- Self-protection

philosophy, strategic-framework, self_development
